title: Window function applied to BIT column produces non-BIT type
poc: select c0, ':', lead(c0) over() from t0;
select c0, ':', first_value(c0) over() from t0;
select c0, ':', max(c0) over() from t0;
SELECT c0 FROM (SELECT nullif(c0,1) FROM t0) t0 (c0) ORDER BY c0;
CREATE TABLE t1 SELECT c0 FROM (SELECT nullif(c0,1) FROM t0) t0 (c0) ORDER BY c0;
key_bug_features: Window functions return non-BIT type for BIT column
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (c1 BIT(1) NOT NULL, c2 INT DEFAULT 0);
SELECT c1, ':', LAG(c1) OVER (ORDER BY c2) FROM t2;
SELECT c1, ':', MAX(c1) OVER () FROM t2;
CREATE TABLE t3 AS SELECT c1 FROM (SELECT NULLIF(c1, 0) AS c1 FROM t2) AS subquery ORDER BY c1;
